summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates. No merge recommendation is safe because required merge preflight is incomplete and each candidate has either failing proof/checks, unresolved review-bot findings, stale/rebase requirements, active follow-up, or broad scope. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Keep #69954 as the canonical contributor branch for the session cleanup bug, but it needs repair/proof before merge rather than a merge recommendation.
The PR is useful and focused enough to repair, but unresolved review-bot findings and failing proof block merge.
The PR is narrow and likely repairable, but it needs rebase/proof before it can be considered for merge.
The PR is useful but broad enough that finalization requires maintainer judgment on product/scope before a narrow repair artifact would be safe.
This may be a viable PR, but the broad cross-surface delta and stale review context require maintainer review rather than an automated merge or repair plan.

needs_human: #72510 requires maintainer judgment on whether the broad Telegram/auto-reply bot-targeting design and null-vs-undefined semantics should be repaired in this PR or split.
#72677 requires maintainer judgment on whether the broad cron warning/config/protocol/UI/docs/Matrix delta is acceptable as one PR despite proof passing.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the narrow contributor PRs that are useful but currently blocked by proof, rebase, or review-bot findings: #69954, #72025, and #72351. Do not open one combined code PR; these are independent repair tracks and should be dispatched as separate follow-up jobs or contributor-branch repairs.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair proof-blocked narrow PRs from inventory shard 25
repair_candidate.pr_body: This is not intended as a single combined implementation PR. Clownfish should repair the contributor branches separately where possible: #69954 for session cleanup, #72025 for Signal status reactions, and #72351 for TUI history-limit zero. Each repair must preserve source PR attribution, address review-bot findings, rebase onto current main where needed, run the targeted test listed for that PR, run pnpm check:changed, and request Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve #69954 credit for Blahdude / original source PR; current branch also contains an openclaw-clownfish repair commit.
Preserve #72025 credit for Hua688 as the Signal status reaction implementation author.
Preserve #72351 credit for Stedyclaw as the TUI zero-history-limit fix author.
needs_human: #72510 requires maintainer judgment on whether the broad Telegram/auto-reply bot-targeting design and null-vs-undefined semantics should be repaired in this PR or split.
#72677 requires maintainer judgment on whether the broad cron warning/config/protocol/UI/docs/Matrix delta is acceptable as one PR despite proof passing.
